title: Redstone Additions
description: Adds breeders, block breaker, conveyors, block placers, and more !!! Vanilla friendly
body:
# ⚠️THIS DATAPACK HAS BEEN REWRITTEN AT https://modrinth.com/datapack/redstone-additions
DO NOT USE THIS VERSION. REWRITE IS MUCH BETTER.


# ⚡ Redstone Additions - Automate Minecraft! ⚡
---

Welcome to the ultimate redstone enhancement datapack for Minecraft 1.21.4! Get ready to revolutionize your redstone builds with powerful new components and mechanics.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mHkcYZpa3Rk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Transform your redstone contraptions from simple circuits into incredible automated machinery. Whether you're a technical player or just getting started with redstone, this datapack opens up exciting new possibilities! 

## ✨ Quick Preview
Take a look at what awaits you:

![Hub](https://github.com/AnCarsenat/RedstoneAdditions/blob/main/Assets/screenshots/2025-04-06_21.36.13.png?raw=true)

### Recipes 📙
To craft the items there are three branches :
#### Vanilla
Using the crafting table
(Recipes are up above)

#### Enchantment 📖
Using an enchanting table

*Throw certain items over an enchantment table (You find them)*

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Lava or Smooth Stone, they have small chances of transforming into cores
</details>


#### Pressing 🗜️
Using a press AKA extended piston+smithing table

*Throw certain combinations of items onto the press and run it*


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Material Core + Reactor Core ==> Material Reactor
</details>



### Test the blocks quickly in creative by running :
```/function redstone_additions:items/give_all```



# Details

___
I am looking for youtubers / editors to present this datapack, if you are one, consider making a video, i WILL pin it here
PS: The armor stands you see are invisible with devmode=False, when I made the datapack I made sure to disable it, so don't worry, they will be invisible
___


A Minecraft datapack that enhances redstone functionality for version 1.21.4.

## Features
- Enhanced redstone mechanics
- New redstone components
- Performance optimizations

## Downoalds

## Installation
1. Download the latest release
2. Place the datapack in your world's `datapacks` folder
3. Reload your world
